info.title: backuphash
info.description: A CLI for users to back up their files without redundancy.

commands.name: gen
commands.description: Generates a default 'backuphashignore' file in the working directory.

commands.name: backup
commands.description: Backs up the provided input file/directory (working directory if unspecified) to the provided output directory (working directory if unspecified).

commands.name: view
commands.description: Views the backups present in the backup directory. If a timestamp is provided, the directory structure of the backup at that time will be revealed. If a timestamp is not provided, the timestamps of the various snapshots will be listed.

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Restores a backup in the backup directory to the output directory. Use --input to restore files to a different location than where they were when they were first backed up.
